Rust Programming Language

A language empowering everyone to build reliable and efficient software. Rust is blazingly fast and memory-efficient.

The Rust Programming Language - The Rust Book

The Rust Programming Language book, commonly known as "The Book", is the official guide to learning Rust.

Rust (programming language) - Wikipedia

Rust is a multi-paradigm, general-purpose programming language that emphasizes performance, type safety, and concurrency.
